rows.label: qev019102_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh, what is it? Do you need something from me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hmm? Yes, I did give a Data Probe to a
Larsian named Go-Shiro, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0003
rows.name:
What? She broke it during installation?
How should I say this... Larsians are certainly bold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmmm... I want aliens to learn more and more about
Frontier Net, so I'd love to give her as many Data Probes
as it takes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0005
rows.name:
The one I gave her was a custom-made item, designed
to be much easier to handle than the ones we use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0006
rows.name:
I don't have any in stock, and to make one I need an
ore called Arc Sand Ore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0007
rows.name:
If I just had that, I could make it for her right away...
Say, do you think you could obtain it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019102_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you will go get it for Go-Shiro.

rows.label: qev019102_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Try to leave, stating you have no
obligation to go that far.

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hehe. To think the student who was receiving lectures
from me just a short while ago is suddenly teaching
aliens how to use Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0009
rows.name:
There's nothing to be more proud of.
Do your best and teach her to the very end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Wait a minute. Then this is a request from me...
or rather, an order.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0011
rows.name:
Look after her to the very end.
That is your responsibility as her teacher.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0012
rows.name:
The required ore is Arc Sand Ore, right? About 10 pieces
should be fine. Please go mine them quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hehe, this time I designed a sturdy Data Probe that
even a Larsian absolutely cannot break, and it's
easy to handle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0014
rows.name:
If I have Arc Sand Ore, I can make it right away...
How did it go? Did you get it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0015
rows.name:
As expected of the teacher! I'll make it for you
right away, so wait here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Here, take it. With this, no matter how much superhuman
strength a Larsian has, they cannot destroy it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0017
rows.name:
I made various modifications, so its performance has
dropped to a level where it's not practical, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019102_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, it's fine for practice, right?
Make sure you lecture her thoroughly to the very end.[ST:wait ]
